customCommands.name: digest
customCommands.description: Run the email digest (shortcut for the full python command)
customCommands.command: mamba run -n email-digest python -m email_digest digest run ${input} --dry-run

customCommands.name: digest-full
customCommands.description: Run digest without dry-run (generates HTML + emails)
customCommands.command: mamba run -n email-digest python -m email_digest digest run ${input}

customCommands.name: digest-candidates
customCommands.description: List Gmail candidates for a topic
customCommands.command: mamba run -n email-digest python -m email_digest digest candidates ${input} --max-results 10
